validation_result is currently missing (null), the state explicitly marks preferred_next_action as validate_patch, and the generated fullstack article cover image patches need to be validated for syntax correctness and no unintended breaking changes before proceeding to the review step.

The patch plan already contains complete non-empty patches and summary, validation_result is present confirming all patches are syntactically valid with no errors, the state explicitly specifies preferred_next_action as review_patch to audit the generated fullstack patches against acceptance criteria, constraints and skill risk rules.

The patch plan has complete non-empty patches and valid summary, syntax validation passed, full review against acceptance criteria and risk rules is approved, no pre-execution steps remain, and the state explicitly sets preferred_next_action to execute_patch.

Preferred next action is explicitly specified as verify_result, dry-run patch execution has completed successfully, patch validation and review are already approved, so now run the configured test commands to confirm the cover image feature implementation meets all acceptance criteria.

All required workflow steps including file location, patch generation, syntax validation, risk review, dry-run patch execution, and test verification have been fully completed, and the state explicitly defines the preferred next action as summarize_result to finalize the task output.
